'''Dooni's mother''' was a quadruped who lived on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The protective mother of [[Dooni]], she was the leader of her [[Foonar]] herd. She was once enslaved by a species of [[Rok's species|green-skinned harvesters]] from another world. She was later freed from her shackles by [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], and her own Dooni. She then helped the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] turn the slavers' own [[Harvester/Legends|harvester]] machine against them, driving them away from the forest moon.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]] {{1st}}
